textByHashes.df5b632c1821c8394509995f26a1564d5b036f90: Oi! Where d'you think you're going? Come and speak to me before you go wondering through there. You'll get yourself killed!
textByHashes.4a21d085e446806173a3e4ec0474b23ce70aecbc: Oi, get yer hands off that! It's reserved for survivors of the Colosseum.
textByHashes.0c78a2b3eff832e7a60b6ca1a673807d4f145c4b: This place...? Why, This is the great Fortis Colosseum!
textByHashes.a5e6a4c0927723a94e4a9d9c28e64a58bae17c56: Adventurers come from near and far to test their might within these walls.
textByHashes.babd408f80d51252bad9a1845956c83d62efbaf6: Indeed it is. If you are victorious in the Colosseum, the whole of Varlamore shall hear of your name.
textByHashes.8455c2bb86e6a8c5291ee9e9be48587e57214dd9: It'll put your skills to the test alright.
textByHashes.504f96c8ffeb9aeb53123cfe9661240d430acece: Just head through that tunnel behind me and we'll get the show started! Make sure you've got everything you need. Once you're in you can't leave until the end of a wave!
textByHashes.98608feb8da3edd0aba13e7a724f712f571a06c5: Come and ask if you have any other questions.
textByHashes.cc763da7739d78978709d4d518ead1b1597f9f4a: Yes! After all, they were my idea...
textByHashes.721fd3c735d7add890f87c391fa17162742cdb06: Every time you complete a wave, I'll offer you a choice of three modifiers.
textByHashes.8e026b79fd9f3614b25322bae9fa1786c88e10a1: Each modifier will increase the challenge for the rest of the run - So choose wisely!
textByHashes.544ee66c6dbe7c0d5186700ee7edca85d89580a8: Some modifiers can be offered multiple times, with the effects then growing in power!
textByHashes.aa44bf39afc689f7f1025211b1c3dc8ed6ad037b: Well it's a bit different to just killing monsters and picking up items, as I'm sure you're used to...
textByHashes.9ed5d86f0f75557a7aa2a5aaa7dcac79af96acfd: After each wave inside the Colosseum, I'll show you the rewards you have earned, as well as what you'll earn from the next wave...
textByHashes.0fd1d965ab9423f78555b207563dcd5383518c77: If you aren't confident that you can complete the next wave, you can claim your existing rewards and exit early.
textByHashes.4a9b8e1d98857e441607e3bc9a1a4e4748344286: However, if you're confident you can beat the next wave, you can risk your whole reward pile to get even more!
textByHashes.411980423963a995c9c8d21e2ea997a924a6d2a3: Be careful though. If you die or leave the arena before claiming your loot from me, you will lose all of the rewards you've earned.
textByHashes.048f356a42614f928d8c6e881b4be085f349bb00: Even better - if you manage to finish all of the waves and the final challenge, then you'll be awarded with Dizana's Quiver.
textByHashes.4bbfbbdaa65600c8cd707865bc7a27efdc8a15ad: It's a handy piece of kit that you wear on your back to store extra bolts or arrows.
textByHashes.a44eb7a12308a2eea403bc1f8ed3f177a81565a5: It's the measure of your progress inside the Colosseum.
textByHashes.314913f6c01bf644d91d14fdc7754fefc5f20bf8: Speak to Gloria over there if you want to know the details.
textByHashes.f0c0a9533adc8d7ade57452b1b4ed2da746c7c97: I'm Minimus. It's not my real name of course, but it seems to have stuck. I started out competing here as a gladiator when I was a young'n. After that I became one of the lanistas.
textByHashes.6187bcdbd65430f7b753c2972e1929e1bed16af4: The ones responsible for overseeing the selecting and training of the gladiators.
textByHashes.c6cb64c17bcfc2c9da684ac0d0bdd13a6ed5601e: Eventually, the kingdom gave me the role of Colosseum Master. I still make sure to fit some fighting in, but now I have the honor of managing the fights themselves.
textByHashes.948ef28db0b73709f9cddf9c2cd7eec291868437: I have no need! I'm already one of the greatest fighters to grace this arena.
textByHashes.cce387c692919b9eefcc96f70f4976929cf92b29: No! How dare you even suggest that! Those spindly human bodies are unfit to go toe to toe with a fine dwarf like myself!
textByHashes.88a4cef69daad264cbf31e33ecf08931d5707579: Now, did you need anything else?
textByHashes.318924b5ef1a5c3731556a547771ece62f63125d: Let me know when you want to begin.
textByHashes.8fab58b5d734f5f65751847df70a2544a1af9cff: Leaving now will forfeit your run, with you only being rewarded the items you have earned so far.
textByHashes.098aa8fb3a2041033d8d87e68ab836c65b3ff213: It was a valiant effort, . I've popped all your earned rewards into that chest over there. You can retrieve them from it when ready.
textByHashes.de3b169c8982b1c9a151883031cfd0e2c9a70b0c: You want to offer it for some Sunfire splinters? I could also try to convince Smol Heredit to follow you.
textByHashes.21b3f35f8d84cceeecde48c45c642e1d0dcf0ff0: But be aware, you will not get the quiver back.
textByHashes.ff7ceae2388f5ab019d7f9d361d9b5fc07ed1724: Very well, Grand Champion. Keep your trophy.
textByHashes.13a7fa8643ff85f783ec9c74ebb5094f8b177041: It doesn't actually look like you have enough space to carry 4,000 Sunfire splinters. Come back when you have room.
textByHashes.655f5661d4f8d56e072e99f2284e79cc76d6a92f: He doesn't want to go with you. Sorry.
textByHashes.c0f85c8301f3dbbcd30e7ef1587a6ee4d9bc35e8: He seems to like you. Smol heredit is yours.
textByHashes.96aec182c0fa413616645ea8904dffed8600066e: You want to offer it for some Sunfire splinters?
textByHashes.5f16f2a9259659a0cf7de308d082fa0d2070dcc9: I'm afraid you can only offer spare uncharged versions of the quiver to me.
